name: pepperize-cdk-github

metadata.name: pepperize.cdk-github
metadata.summary: Manage GitHub resources like repositories, teams, members, integrations and workflows with the AWS CDK as Custom Resources in CloudFormation with [cdk-github](https://github.com/pepperize/cdk-github).

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubApiCall.__init__
documentation:
---
param endpoint: The endpoint to call.
param ignore_error_codes_matching: The regex pattern to use to catch API errors. The
  `message` property of the `RequestError` object will be tested against this pattern.
  If there is a match an error will not be thrown.
param method: The method to call.
param output_paths: 'Filter the data returned by the custom resource to specific paths
  in the API response. The total size of the response body can''t exceed 4096 bytes.
  Default: undefined - it''s recommended to define it'
param parameters: The parameters for the service action.
param physical_resource_id: 'The physical resource id of the custom resource for this
  call. Default: undefined - for "Create" requests, defaults to the event''s RequestId,
  for "Update" and "Delete", defaults to the current `PhysicalResourceId`.'
---

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubApiCall.endpoint
documentation:
The endpoint to call.

:see: https://github.com/octokit/rest.js

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubApiCall.method
documentation:
The method to call.

:see: https://github.com/octokit/rest.js

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubApiCall.ignore_error_codes_matching
documentation:
The regex pattern to use to catch API errors.

The `message` property of the `RequestError` object will be tested against this pattern. If there is a match an error will not be thrown.

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubApiCall.output_paths
documentation:
Filter the data returned by the custom resource to specific paths in the API response.

The total size of the response body can't exceed 4096 bytes.

:default: undefined - it's recommended to define it

:see:

https://docs.github.com/en/rest

Example for octokit.rest.repos.createInOrg: ['id', 'full_name', 'owner.id']

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubApiCall.parameters
documentation:
The parameters for the service action.

:see: https://github.com/octokit/rest.js

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubApiCall.physical_resource_id
documentation:
The physical resource id of the custom resource for this call.

```
default

undefined - for "Create" requests, defaults to the event's RequestId, for "Update" and "Delete", defaults to the current PhysicalResourceId.

see

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/crpg-ref-responses.html
```

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResourceBase.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new construct node.

```
param scope

The scope in which to define this construct.

param id

The scoped construct ID. Must be unique amongst siblings. If the ID includes a path separator (/), then it will be replaced by double dash --.
```

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResourceBase.get_att
documentation:
Returns the value of an attribute of the custom resource of an arbitrary type.

Attributes are returned from the custom resource provider through the
`Data` map where the key is the attribute name.

```
param attribute_name

the name of the attribute.

return

```

a token for `Fn::GetAtt`. Use `Token.asXxx` to encode the returned `Reference` as a specific type or
use the convenience `getAttString` for string attributes.

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResourceBase.get_att_string
documentation:
Returns the value of an attribute of the custom resource of type string.

Attributes are returned from the custom resource provider through the
`Data` map where the key is the attribute name.

```
param attribute_name

the name of the attribute.

return

a token for Fn::GetAtt encoded as a string.
```

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResourceBase.ref
documentation: The physical name of this custom resource.

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResourceOptions.__init__
pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResourceOptions.auth_options
documentation:
Currently, supports only GitHub App.

Example:

```
const auth = { appId, privateKey };
const installationAuth = { appId, privateKey, installationId };
```

```
see

https://github.com/octokit/authentication-strategies.js/#github-app-or-installation-authentication
```

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResourceProps.__init__
documentation:
---
param auth_options: 'Currently, supports only GitHub App. Example:: const auth = {
  appId, privateKey }; const installationAuth = { appId, privateKey, installationId
  };'
param on_create: The GitHub Api call to make when the resource is created.
param on_delete: The GitHub Api call to make when the resource is deleted.
param on_update: The GitHub Api call to make when the resource is updated.
param resource_type: Cloudformation Resource type.
---

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_github.GithubCustomResource.__init__
documentation:
---
param auth_options: 'Currently, supports only GitHub App. Example:: const auth = {
  appId, privateKey }; const installationAuth = { appId, privateKey, installationId
  };'
param id: '-'
param on_create: The GitHub Api call to make when the resource is created.
param on_delete: The GitHub Api call to make when the resource is deleted.
param on_update: The GitHub Api call to make when the resource is updated.
param resource_type: Cloudformation Resource type.
param scope: '-'
---
